---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for create-dsa-lab
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point.

*Example: "I have to manually track which problems I've solved and when I should revisit them."*

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

- Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools
- How would this work with the existing dashboard/config system?
- Would this be a CLI command, dashboard action, or config option?
